name: expense-tracker-workspace
description: Workspace helpers for the Expense Tracker frontend and backend apps.

scripts.setup: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: npm run setup && npx concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.check:backend: node --check backend/server.js && node --check backend/routes/transactions.js && node --check backend/models/Transaction.js
